title: Reconstitution of Central Advisory Board u/s 8(a) of COFEPOSA Act for year 1991-92
description: Reconstitution of Central Advisory Board u/s 8(a) of COFEPOSA Act for year 1991-92
text: REGISTERED NO. D. (D.N.) 127 The Gazette of India EXTRAORDlNARY PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY No. 83) NEW DELHI, THURSDAY,FEBRUARY 28, 1991/PHALGUNA 9,1912 Separate Paging is given to this Part in order that it may be filed as A separate compilation (i) 567 til/91 -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTB OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART H ~ S E C . 3(i)] MINISTRY OF FINANCE (Department of Revenue) NOTIFICATION! New Delhi, the 28th February. 1991 G.S.R. 97(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Clause (a) of section 8 of the Conservation of Foreign Exchange and Prevention of Smuggling Activities Act, 1974 (52 of 1974), and in supersession of the notification of ihe Government of India in the Ministry of Finance (Department of Revenue) No. G.S.R. 715 (E) dated 26th July. IDS9, the Central Government hereby constitute? an Advisory Board consisting of :— CHAIRMAN 1. Hon'ble Mr. Justice D. P. Wadhwa, Judge of the Delhi High Court. MEMBERS 2. Hon'ble Mr. Justice M. JL. Jain, Retired Judge of the Delhi High Court. 3. Hon'ble Mr. Justice N. N. Goswamy, Retired Judge of the Delhi High Court. [F. No. 674J1191-Cus. Vlfl] KULD1P SINGH.
